calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Interest In Real Property Located At 1235 Bay Street, San Francisco, Ca 94123 (Apn Block 0473 Lot 019)
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amir Sarreshtehdary for Susan Wong (Petitioner/Trustee).

The Court raised questions regarding ownership of the property and the back and forth transactions that took place. Mr. Sarreshtehdary made reference to the operating agreement of the LLC, the rescission deed and the K=1 reflecting the name of the Trustee. Mr. Sarreshtehdary also stated that the Trustors may not have been clear as to what they were signing, spoke of other rescission deeds, stated that he is not sure if it was a Scribner's error and that the properties were not in existence in 2006. The Petition for Order Confirming Interest in Real Property Located at 1235 Bay Street, San Francisco is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
